_comment: Unique items for HOLLOWFANE v0.8.0. Spec §4.4 calls for ≥60 uniques at v1.0; this is the spike subset. Each unique has a fixed name, flavor line, base item ref (matched against data/items.json), and 4–5 fixed affixes. The unique_mechanic field is descriptive only in v0.8.0 — the on-hit / on-cast hooks land Week 9 alongside class skill kits. LootRoller injects one of these on a UNIQUE rarity roll.

uniques.name: Crusher of Kings
uniques.flavor: Forged in the bone-pits of the third age.
uniques.unique_mechanic: On hit: chains a faint lightning arc to one nearby enemy. (Wired Week 9.)

uniques.name: Whisper of Ash
uniques.flavor: It hums when the bearer steps near a tomb.

uniques.name: Axe of Sunrise
uniques.flavor: Cast from the scrap of a fallen sun-tower.
uniques.unique_mechanic: Casts a small dawn-pulse on the player every 8s. (Wired Week 9.)

uniques.name: Frostmother's Fang
uniques.flavor: Once a fang. Once a child. Once a song.

uniques.name: Vow of the Silent
uniques.flavor: She broke her vow once. She does not speak of it.
uniques.unique_mechanic: Crit chance vs. enemies above 80% HP doubles. (Wired Week 9.)
